name: chr8_p23_1_REPD_REPP_inv_flank
description: 8p23.1 inversion polymorphism (~4-5 Mb) is mediated by two SD blocks REPD/REPP (~550 kb, 99.4% identity) containing olfactory receptor and DEFB beta-defensin gene clusters. ~26-54% of European chromosomes carry the inverted haplotype. Inversion-carrying parents have elevated risk of producing offspring with recurrent 8p23.1 deletions or duplications (PMP22 dosage-like rearrangements unrelated to CMT). Also drives DEFB4 copy-number variation 2-12.

architecture.internal_structure: OR/DEFB-cluster-rich blocks REPD (distal) and REPP (proximal) flank a ~4 Mb common inversion polymorphism. Core contains olfactory receptors, beta-defensin cluster, MTMR9, FAM167A.
